# ggsegFreeSurfer

This package provides FreeSurfer cortical and subcortical brain atlases
formatted for use with [ggseg](https://ggseg.github.io/ggseg/) and
[ggseg3d](https://ggseg.github.io/ggseg3d/).

| Atlas                      | Function                                                                             | Type        | Regions/hemi |
|----------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------|--------------|
| Desikan-Killiany-Tourville | [`dkt()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegFreeSurfer/reference/dkt.md)             | Cortical    | 32           |
| Destrieux                  | [`destrieux()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegFreeSurfer/reference/destrieux.md) | Cortical    | 75           |
| HCP Subcortical            | [`hcpa()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegFreeSurfer/reference/hcpa.md)           | Subcortical | –            |

To learn how to use these atlases, please look at the documentation for
[ggseg](https://ggseg.github.io/ggseg/) and
[ggseg3d](https://ggseg.github.io/ggseg3d/).

## Installation

You can install ggsegFreeSurfer from [GitHub](https://github.com/) with:

``` r
# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("ggsegverse/ggsegFreeSurfer")
```

## Atlases

``` r
library(ggseg)
library(ggsegFreeSurfer)
library(ggplot2)

ggplot() +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = dkt(),
    mapping = aes(fill = label),
    position = position_brain(hemi ~ view),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  ggtitle("Desikan-Killiany-Tourville") +
  theme_void()
```

![](reference/figures/README-dkt-1.png)

``` r
ggplot() +
  geom_brain(
    atlas = destrieux(),
    mapping = aes(fill = label),
    position = position_brain(hemi ~ view),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  ggtitle("Destrieux (aparc.a2009s)") +
  theme_void()
```

![](reference/figures/README-destrieux-1.png)

``` r
library(ggseg3d)

ggseg3d(atlas = hcpa())
```

![](reference/figures/README-hcpa-1.png)

# Package index

## Atlases

FreeSurfer brain atlases bundled in this package

- [`destrieux()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegFreeSurfer/reference/destrieux.md)
  : Destrieux Cortical Atlas
- [`dkt()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegFreeSurfer/reference/dkt.md)
  : Desikan-Killiany-Tourville Cortical Atlas
- [`hcpa()`](https://ggsegverse.github.io/ggsegFreeSurfer/reference/hcpa.md)
  : HCP Subcortical Atlas
